creator: m.tsatsenko@gmail.com
text:
I am getting the same issue with another port I am currently working.
As you can see for some reason %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%% variable which is usually /usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/ is not substituted.
And I think we hit some infrastructure bug.

Could you please run make -V PYTHON_SITELIBDIR under py-sqlalchemy port's directoru?
